summary: Frontend testing completed for Referrals page and VIP Membership page. All requested features verified and working correctly.

minor.issue: Returns 404 - VIP plans endpoint may not be configured

critical_code_review_comments: Referrals.js: Well-structured with collapsible Bonus Structure and 5-level network display
VIPMembership.js: Complete 4-step flow implemented with proper validation
Both pages use proper state management and animations with framer-motion
context_for_next_testing_agent: Referrals and VIP pages fully tested. Test user is a FREE user so VIP subscription flow is visible. Routes: /referrals and /vip

bonus_structure_section.details: Collapsible card with 'Bonus Structure' title and 'Bonus only on active referrals' subtitle

bonus_percentages.details: L1=10%, L2=5%, L3=3%, L4=2%, L5=1% - All displayed correctly

five_level_network.details: 5 expandable level cards (L1-L5) with Total/Active counts displayed

collapsible_bonus_structure.details: Expands to show all 5 levels with descriptions and Maximum Bonus: +21%

collapsible_level_cards.details: Each level card expands to show referrals or empty state message

active_bonus_text.details: 'Bonus only on active referrals' text displayed in English and Marathi

step_progress_bar.details: 4 steps visible: Select Plan, Make Payment, Upload Proof, Submit

step1_select_plan.details: VIP Benefits grid (6 benefits), Plan selection cards with prices (Monthly ₹269.1, Quarterly ₹897, Half-yearly ₹1794, Yearly)

step2_payment_info.details: Amount to Pay displayed, Payment Instructions with 3 steps, QR code area (if configured)

step3_upload_proof.details: UTR input field, Screenshot upload with Camera/Upload options, Date/Time fields

step4_review_submit.details: Review Details with plan summary, UTR, date, time, screenshot status, Submit Application button

vip_expiry_display.details: For VIP users: Shows expiry date with days remaining, color-coded (red/amber/green), Renew button if expiring

form_validation.details: Cannot proceed to Step 4 without UTR and screenshot

screenshots_taken: .screenshots/referrals_full.png - Referrals page with Bonus Structure and Your Network sections
.screenshots/referrals_bonus_open.png - Bonus Structure expanded showing all 5 levels
.screenshots/vip_page_step1.png - VIP page Step 1 with benefits and plan selection
.screenshots/vip_page_step2.png - VIP page Step 2 with payment instructions
.screenshots/vip_page_step3.png - VIP page Step 3 with UTR and upload fields
.screenshots/vip_step3_filled.png - Step 3 with UTR filled, showing validation works
